tips_en: Start with Claw‑Eval, as it defines the core evaluation gaps (44 % missed safety violations, etc.) that any future agent work—including the efficiency analysis in PTE and the training improvements in RLSD—must address. PTE’s hardware‑aware cost metric can be directly plugged into Claw‑Eval’s scoring to give a more realistic measure of agent performance, while RLSD demonstrates a training technique that can raise scores on the very benchmarks Claw‑Eval introduces. Reading them in this order links evaluation, efficiency, and training into a coherent workflow.
tips_zh: 先读Claw‑Eval，了解LLM代理评估的核心缺陷（安全违规遗漏44%等），这些缺陷是后续研究必须解决的问题。PTE的硬件感知成本指标可以直接集成到Claw‑Eval的评分体系中，提供更真实的性能评估；而RLSD则展示了一种能够提升Claw‑Eval所考察任务得分的训练方法。三篇论文形成从评估、效率到训练的完整闭环。
